description: Style NoteEarthy tones for the summer, catwalk serves up another stylish sandal for women. We love the innovative design details on this pair!Product DetailsSynthetic toe separator and thong style straps with floral detailsSoft, curved footbed with a heel patchThick midsoleTPU outsole with a floral lug at the heelMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
